title: ESA Report Generator field contract
description: Recommended Excel ProjectData columns and sidebar fields. Primary use: Alberta O&G Phase I (Ecoventure Inc.).

ProjectData.layout: Row 1 = column headers (become Jinja keys after normalization). Row 2 = values for the report.

DrillingWaste.layout: One row per disposal record. Loop variable: drilling_waste.

StorageTanks.layout: One row per tank. Loop variable: storage_tanks.

LabResults.layout: One row per analyte. Headers: Analyte, Result, Unit, Criteria, Exceedance (aliases accepted).

sidebar_meta.template_version: Optional semantic version of the Word template (e.g. 2.1.0)

template_rules: Type each {{ tag }} in one continuous run in Word (no bold/color mid-tag).
Use static table header row, then {%tr for item in lab_results %} for Phase 2 lab data.
Phase 1 Alberta: {%tr for item in drilling_waste %} and storage_tanks loops.
Reports originate from Ecoventure Inc.; client data per project Excel.
Run pre-flight before every production generate.
